summary: Started building websites for local businesses while pursuing an undergraduate degree — learning not just code but how to listen to a client, translate their vision into a digital product, and deliver work that exceeded expectations.
detail: Those early years forged a discipline carried into every engagement. Over 100 clients later, most of my work still comes from referrals — because the best marketing is a client who won't stop talking about what you built for them.

summary: Engineered the backbone of payroll infrastructure used by organisations across Zimbabwe — including government institutions, banks, and private sector enterprises. Mission-critical software where precision is not optional.
detail: Working in enterprise fintech taught me to build with precision, document with discipline, and think in systems. Simultaneously ran a parallel track — continuing web development contracts, influencer management, and corporate digital consulting. Became fluent in context-switching between deep technical work and client-facing strategy.
highlight: 5-year enterprise build. Zero payroll errors in production.

role: Independent Digital Consultant & Full Stack Engineer
summary: Expanded beyond product engineering into strategic digital consulting — partnering with corporates like Quest Financial Services, FBC Bank, the Government of Zimbabwe, African Sun Hotels, Mahindra Zimbabwe, and more.
detail: Simultaneously stepped into artist and influencer management, growing social media presence for prominent Zimbabwean creators. This dual-track work — technical and human — reinforced a belief held deeply: the best engineers are also great communicators.

summary: Moved to Washington DC to pursue graduate studies in Data Analytics — with a real focus on building at the frontier of AI: computer vision, real-time machine learning, and intelligent systems.
detail: Not just studying AI — actively building with it: designing RAG-powered applications, training custom vision models, deploying autonomous AI agents, and applying the full stack of modern AI (LLMs, vector embeddings, multimodal systems) to real-world problems. Every line of research connects back to tangible, deployable impact.
